overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Weston Plan Commission was scheduled to address several planning matters including continued discussion on a salt storage shed inspection program for wellhead protection, site plan review for a new police department and municipal court facility, and review of staff-approved projects and building permits from April 2026.

agenda.item: Open public comment period for items that do not appear on this agenda noted as public hearings
Minutes from April 13, 2026, Plan Commission Meeting
Unfinished Business – Creation of a Salt Storage Shed Inspection Program – Wellhead Protection District
Site Plan Review - Project #20260116 - Mountain Bay Metro Police Department & Municipal Court Facility – 3600 Community Center Drive
April 2026 Staff-Approved Certified Survey Maps and Site Plans
Planning & Development Department Monthly Project Update Report
Future Agenda Items or Staff Referrals

discussions.item: Creation of a Salt Storage Shed Inspection Program – Wellhead Protection District
discussions.body: The Commission was scheduled to continue discussion on creating an inspection program for salt storage sheds within the Wellhead Protection District. This item was carried over as unfinished business from a previous meeting and relates to groundwater protection efforts.

discussions.item: Site Plan Review - Mountain Bay Metro Police Department & Municipal Court Facility
discussions.body: The Commission was set to review a site plan application for a new police department and municipal court facility at 3600 Community Center Drive. This represents a significant public safety infrastructure project for the Mountain Bay Metro area.

discussions.item: April 2026 Staff-Approved Certified Survey Maps and Site Plans
discussions.body: The Commission was expected to receive a report on certified survey maps and site plans that were administratively approved by staff during April 2026.
The Commission was scheduled to review building permit activity from April 2026 as part of regular monitoring of development activity in the Village.

discussions.item: Planning & Development Department Monthly Project Update Report
discussions.body: Staff was expected to provide the Commission with a monthly update on ongoing planning and development projects within the Village.

discussions.item: Future Agenda Items or Staff Referrals
discussions.body: The Commission was set to discuss potential future agenda items including electric vehicle charging stations and the 2026 Housing Affordability Report.

publicComment: Public comment period was included on the agenda for items not appearing as public hearings.
actionItems: Scheduled to consider approval of April 13, 2026 meeting minutes
Expected to continue deliberation on salt storage shed inspection program for wellhead protection
Scheduled to review and potentially take action on site plan for Mountain Bay Metro Police Department & Municipal Court Facility
title: Plan Commission - 5/11/2026
